segments.text: And Naomi had a kinsman of her husband's, a mighty man of wealth, of the family of Elimelech; and his name was Boaz.
Let me now go to the field, and glean ears of corn after him in whose sight I shall find grace.
segments.speaker: Ruth

segments.text: Go, my daughter.
segments.speaker: Naomi

segments.text: And she went, and came, and gleaned in the field after the reapers: and her hap was to light on a part of the field belonging unto Boaz, who was of the kindred of Elimelech.
And, behold, Boaz came from Beth-lehem,
The LORD be with you.
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: The LORD bless thee.
segments.speaker: Reapers

segments.text: Whose damsel is this?
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: It is the Moabitish damsel that came back with Naomi out of the country of Moab:
segments.speaker: Servant

segments.text: I pray you, let me glean and gather after the reapers among the sheaves: so she came, and hath continued even from the morning until now, that she tarried a little in the house.
segments.speaker: Ruth

segments.text: Hearest thou not, my daughter? Go not to glean in another field, neither go from hence, but abide here fast by my maidens:
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: Let thine eyes be on the field that they do reap, and go thou after them: have I not charged the young men that they shall not touch thee? and when thou art athirst, go unto the vessels, and drink of that which the young men have drawn.
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: Then she fell on her face, and bowed herself to the ground,
Why have I found grace in thine eyes, that thou shouldest take knowledge of me, seeing I am a stranger?
segments.speaker: Ruth

segments.text: It hath fully been shewed me, all that thou hast done unto thy mother in law since the death of thine husband: and how thou hast left thy father and thy mother, and the land of thy nativity, and art come unto a people which thou knewest not heretofore.
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: The LORD recompense thy work, and a full reward be given thee of the LORD God of Israel, under whose wings thou art come to trust.
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: Let me find favour in thy sight, my lord; for that thou hast comforted me, and for that thou hast spoken friendly unto thine handmaid, though I be not like unto one of thine handmaidens.
segments.speaker: Ruth

segments.text: At mealtime come thou hither, and eat of the bread, and dip thy morsel in the vinegar.
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: And she sat beside the reapers: and he reached her parched corn, and she did eat, and was sufficed, and left.
Let her glean even among the sheaves, and reproach her not:
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: And let fall also some of the handfuls of purpose for her, and leave them, that she may glean them, and rebuke her not.
segments.speaker: Boaz

segments.text: So she gleaned in the field until even, and beat out that she had gleaned: and it was about an ephah of barley.
And she took it up, and went into the city: and her mother in law saw what she had gleaned: and she brought forth, and gave to her that she had reserved after she was sufficed.
Where hast thou gleaned to day? and where wroughtest thou? blessed be he that did take knowledge of thee.
segments.speaker: Naomi

segments.text: The man's name with whom I wrought to day is Boaz.
segments.speaker: Ruth

segments.text: Blessed be he of the LORD, who hath not left off his kindness to the living and to the dead.
segments.speaker: Naomi

segments.text: The man is near of kin unto us, one of our next kinsmen.
segments.speaker: Naomi

footnotes: one of…: or, one that hath right to redeem

segments.text: He said unto me also, Thou shalt keep fast by my young men, until they have ended all my harvest.
segments.speaker: Ruth

segments.text: It is good, my daughter, that thou go out with his maidens, that they meet thee not in any other field.
segments.speaker: Naomi

segments.text: So she kept fast by the maidens of Boaz to glean unto the end of barley harvest and of wheat harvest; and dwelt with her mother in law.
